abstract: Guidance for the Terra API Models product: run a health model (Sleep Window, Health Terrain) over a connected user's data for a date range to return a ready-to-use wellness insight. Covers the /v2/models catalog and /v2/models/run endpoints and auth, the two generally-available models and their data needs, handling empty or unsupported results (HTTP 200, not errors), per-run pricing, and the boundary with the Unified API.
